rationale: Educ. Code §29.055 governs bilingual education program content and instruction methods. It contains no reference to homestead exemptions, property tax, or school funding formulas affected by the proposed Tax Code §11.13(b) change.
quote: A bilingual education program established by a school district shall be a full-time program of dual-language instruction
_note: No conflict; rule is substantively unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase.
